name: Variations on Rice Krispies Marshmallow Square
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Rice Krispie treats base as directed in the original recipe.
2. For variations, substitute Cocoa Krispies for Rice Krispies.
3. Melt 2 squares of unsweetened chocolate and combine with marshmallows.
4. Stir in 1/4 cup peanut butter to the marshmallow mixture.
5. Add 1 cup raisins to the Rice Krispie treats base.
6. Alternatively, add 1 cup salted peanuts to the Rice Krispie treats base.
7. Combine all ingredients as directed in the original recipe.
8. Press into a greased baking dish and chill until firm.
